headline: T1 Energy Stock Edges Higher Thursday: What's Going On?
summary: T1 Energy shares are edging higher Thursday morning as traders digest a fresh analyst initiation outlining upside and downside scenarios.

headline: First Solar Inc (NASDAQ:FSLR) Passes High Growth Momentum and Trend Template Screen
summary: First Solar (FSLR) passes both the Mark Minervini Trend Template and ChartMill’s High Growth Momentum screen, showing strong uptrend technicals and accelerating earnings and sales growth.
